THEACOLIGHTRELICS-BROKEN_LANTERN.descrip: Start each combat with an additional {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}. At the start of your 2nd turn, lose {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-BROKEN_LANTERN.title: Broken Lantern
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-ECLIPSE_IN_A_JAR.descr: At the start of combat put all curses from your Draw Pile into your Hand.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-ECLIPSE_IN_A_JAR.title: Eclipse in a Jar
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-HOLY_FLAME.description: At the start of your turn, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy then increase this amount by {Increase:diff()}.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-HOLY_FLAME.title: Holy Flame
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-LIGHT_BULB.description: If you end your turn with remaining energy, you can retain that many cards.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-LIGHT_BULB.title: Light Bulb
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-PINK_CRYSTAL.descripti: Heal {Heal:diff()} HP upon pickup. If you lose {Heal:diff()} HP or less during a combat, heal the amount lost at the end of combat.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-PINK_CRYSTAL.title: Pink Crystal
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-RAINBOW_IN_A_JAR.descr: At the start of combat put a random card from your Draw Pile into your Hand.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-RAINBOW_IN_A_JAR.title: Rainbow in a Jar
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-TEMPERED_GLASS.descrip: At the end of combat, if you didn't lose HP, start the next combat with {PlatingPower:diff()} Plating.
THEACOLIGHTRELICS-TEMPERED_GLASS.title: Tempered Glass
